Package index

Simulations

simulate_cellular_automata()
Simulate a one-dimensional elementary cellular automaton
simulate_self_organization()
Simulate self-organization on a simple grid
simulate_agent_interactions()
Simulate simple agent interactions
simulate_network_growth()
Simulate network growth

Measurement and visualization

measure_emergence()
Compute simple emergence-oriented summary metrics
plot_emergence_sim()
Plot emergenceModelR simulation output
